notes: This cockpit only aggregates the currently shipped management summary, minimal diagnostic, and comparison layers.
Comparison outputs and order formal_summary / product_contribution / trend_signal remain derived outputs.
Unavailable dimensions stay explicitly visible and are not presented as covered capabilities.

current_reply_profiles.label: Minimal handoff
current_reply_profiles.note: Use when only the inquiry text or very limited context is available for an external draft.

current_reply_profiles.label: Quote confirmation draft
current_reply_profiles.note: Use when product and customer context already exist, but quote and lead time still need human confirmation.

current_reply_profiles.label: Mockup customization draft
current_reply_profiles.note: Use when the reply depends on mockup, logo, or customization follow-up material.

current_order_profiles.label: Minimal order handoff
current_order_profiles.note: Use when only the basic buyer data and a small amount of line-item context are available for an external order draft.

current_order_profiles.label: Quote confirmation order draft
current_order_profiles.note: Use when line items are available, but price, total amount, and lead time still need human confirmation.

current_order_profiles.label: Commercial review order draft
current_order_profiles.note: Use when the main commercial fields are present, but manual review is still required before any downstream handoff.
